scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @fashion-design-ai/domain && npm run build --workspace @fashion-design-ai/ai && npm run build --workspace @fashion-design-ai/desktop
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build --workspace @fashion-design-ai/domain && npm run build --workspace @fashion-design-ai/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @fashion-design-ai/domain && npm run test --workspace @fashion-design-ai/ai && npm run test --workspace @fashion-design-ai/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @fashion-design-ai/domain && npm run typecheck --workspace @fashion-design-ai/domain && npm run typecheck --workspace @fashion-design-ai/ai && npm run typecheck --workspace @fashion-design-ai/desktop
scripts.typecheck:desktop: npm run build --workspace @fashion-design-ai/domain && npm run typecheck --workspace @fashion-design-ai/desktop
